hero.desc: BetaCare digitizes your medical history so it follows you wherever healthcare takes you — across hospitals, across cities, across Nigeria. No more missing case notes. No more starting over.

problem.desc: Hospitals like UCH still rely on paper to track patient history. The consequences range from inconvenient to life-threatening.

problems.title: Paper records get lost
problems.description: Thousands arrive at hospital only to find their case notes missing — forcing them to restart consultations entirely.

problems.title: Physical damage is irreversible
problems.description: Fires, floods, and daily wear destroy medical history. No backup, no recovery, no continuity of care.

problems.title: No continuity across hospitals
problems.description: Different hospitals have no visibility into prior treatment — leading to duplicate tests and dangerous care gaps.

features.title: Everything you need, one platform
features.desc: Built specifically for the Nigerian healthcare context — reliable, secure, and genuinely easy to use.

list.label: Core Feature
list.title: Digitized Medical Records
list.desc: A secure, cloud-backed database preserving your complete medical history — diagnoses, prescriptions, lab results, and doctor notes.
points: Compliant with Nigeria data privacy laws

list.label: Core Feature
list.title: Nigerian-Friendly Interface
list.desc: BetaCare meets Nigerians on WhatsApp and SMS. No app download. No confusing dashboards. Just the tools they already use.

list.label: AI-Powered
list.title: Context-Aware Health Agent
list.desc: Our AI builds a health profile for each user — monitoring drug usage, reminding about appointments, and flagging health risks early.

howItWorks.title: Simple for everyone involved
howItWorks.desc: Patient, doctor, or hospital — getting started takes minutes.

steps.title: Create your account
steps.desc: Register with name, phone, and email in under 2 minutes.

steps.title: Build your health profile
steps.desc: Answer a short intake form and import existing records via WhatsApp.

steps.title: Access records anywhere
steps.desc: View history, share securely with any doctor, get AI health reminders.

steps.title: Register & enter credentials
steps.desc: Sign up with full name, email, and MDCN licence number.

steps.title: Verify your identity
steps.desc: Email OTP, then liveness check via Smile Identity for full verification.

steps.title: Access patient histories
steps.desc: With consent, view records, update case notes, track patient progress.

steps.title: Apply for integration
steps.desc: Submit hospital credentials and CAC registration for review.

steps.title: Set up your dashboard
steps.desc: Configure patient flow, departments, and doctor accounts.

steps.title: Go live
steps.desc: Begin tracking visits, managing records digitally, and collaborating.

trust.title: Built on trust
trust.desc: Security and privacy are foundational, not afterthoughts.

pillars.title: End-to-End Encrypted
pillars.desc: Your health data is encrypted at rest and in transit. Nobody reads it without your explicit consent.

pillars.title: NDPR Compliant
pillars.desc: Full compliance with the Nigeria Data Protection Regulation and global health data standards.

pillars.title: Patient-First Consent
pillars.desc: You decide who sees your records. Every access request is logged and visible to you.

pillars.title: Always Available
pillars.desc: Your records are accessible even during outages via WhatsApp and SMS. No single point of failure.

hospital.title: Integrate BetaCare into your hospital today
hospital.desc: Give your clinical team instant access to complete patient histories. Reduce paperwork, improve care quality.
benefits: Instant access to patient records at point of care
Reduce consultation time and duplicate testing
Real-time updates across departments and wards
Compliant with Nigerian health data regulations

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.desc: Everything you need to know about BetaCare. Can't find your answer?

items.a: Yes. BetaCare is completely free for patients — always. We charge hospitals and healthcare centres a subscription fee for integration. Patients will never pay.

items.q: How do I access my health records?
items.a: You can access your records via our web dashboard, WhatsApp, or SMS. No app download required. Register once and your records are available wherever you are.
Absolutely. All data is end-to-end encrypted and stored on NDPR-compliant servers. We will never sell your data to third parties. You have full visibility of every access request.
We are in active onboarding with hospitals across Lagos, Abuja, and Port Harcourt. Any hospital can apply for integration through our Hospital portal — the network grows every week.
Doctors go through a three-step process: email OTP verification, MDCN licence number validation, and a liveness check via Smile Identity. Only licensed practitioners get access.

items.q: Can I use BetaCare without a smartphone?
items.a: Yes. BetaCare works entirely over SMS for users without smartphones or internet access. Any phone with a working SIM card and airtime is enough.

items.q: What happens to my records if I switch hospitals?
items.a: Your records belong to you, not the hospital. When you visit a new facility, you authorise them to view your BetaCare profile — your complete history is instantly available.

items.q: How does the AI health agent work?
items.a: The AI builds a health profile from your records and interactions. It proactively sends reminders (drug schedules, upcoming appointments), flags unusual patterns, and answers basic health questions via WhatsApp.

cta.title: Your health story deserves to be remembered
cta.desc: Join Nigerians who have taken control of their health records. Sign up free — no credit card, no app download required.

footer.desc: Digitizing Nigeria's healthcare records, one patient at a time.
